scripts.dev: pnpm run build:sidecar && node scripts/with-env.mjs pnpm --dir app dev:tauri
scripts.dev:web: node scripts/with-env.mjs concurrently -k -n mastra,api,web "pnpm --filter @novel-local-studio/mastra dev" "node scripts/dev-api.mjs" "pnpm --dir app dev"
scripts.dev:desktop: pnpm run build:sidecar && node scripts/with-env.mjs pnpm --dir app dev:tauri
scripts.build: pnpm run build:sidecar && pnpm --dir app build:tauri
